normalization.notes: Store Lao text in NFC while preserving source order for preposed vowels, above and below vowel signs, tone marks, and combining signs. Analysis tooling may inspect syllable frames and tone-mark placement without rewriting source text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, consonant classes, dependent vowel signs by visual position, tone marks, final consonants, silent or leading letters, and common syllable frames
segmentation.notes: Lao spaces usually separate phrases rather than every word. Count dictionary words, syllable frames, vowel signs, and tone marks separately because preposed vowels and combining tone marks affect both decoding order and pronunciation.
